title: Weymouth woman pleads guilty to killing housemate, leaving body in basement
author: Darin Zullo
bullets: Crime The woman was initially charged with murdering her housemate, but reached a plea agreement Monday for voluntary manslaughter.
ShareSend this article to your social connections.
The housemate of a Weymouth woman killed in 2024 was sentenced for manslaughter Monday after reaching an agreement to drop the murder charge she originally faced.
